states.name: queued
states.description: Storage Restore Run is durable and waits for valid restore decision/target eligibility.

states.name: preparing
states.description: Snapshot verification, keys, target storage, conflicts and Transfer Runs are prepared.
entry_requirements: Non-expired restore decision and current Provider generation exist.

states.name: restoring
entry_requirements: Physical Attempts and item scope are correlated.

states.name: verifying
states.description: Created/repaired Locations, Content and metadata relationships are read back.
entry_requirements: Restore outputs exist for declared verification.

states.name: restored_storage
states.description: Required selected bytes/metadata are restored and verified; runtime/application recovery is not implied.
entry_requirements: Required item verification and accepted Locations/Objects exist.

states.name: partial
states.description: Only an explicitly allowed subset restored; failures/conflicts/limitations remain.
entry_requirements: Partial scope was authorized and item outcomes retained.

states.name: failed
states.description: Storage restore terminally failed; partial outputs/conflicts/cleanup evidence remain.
entry_requirements: Failure and output disposition are retained.

states.name: cancelled
states.description: Restore cancelled with temporary/partial state reconciled.

required_preconditions: Restorable decision and Activity/Operation identity exist.
Decision/verification/keys/target Provider are current; conflicts/overwrite policy fixed.
Item Attempts/Transfer Runs are correlated and target staging is ready.
Outputs exist for full Content/location/metadata read-back.
Required selected items restored/verified and accepted output refs exist.
Partial restore was explicitly allowed; failures/conflicts/limitations retained.
Partial target state and temporary files are reconciled.
